summary.label: P2-spaced-rep
summary.note_underpowered: N=10 — confidence intervals are wide; report effect size + direction only

latency_analysis.honest_note: TF-IDF retrieval is O(N*V) deterministic — no native caching. Latency variation is dominated by Claude API call time (network jitter). Any decay signal is API variance, not substrate reinforcement.

tfidf_stability.note: Score variation across queries is expected (different queries). Same-query repetition would show 0 variance.

confidence: LOW (N=10; LLM API latency dominates; no native caching in TF-IDF)
architectural_note: TF-IDF retrieval is O(N*V) deterministic — no native caching. Latency variation is dominated by Claude API call time (network jitter). Any decay signal is API variance, not substrate reinforcement.
